The '''2014 season''' was the '''[[Castleford Tigers]]'''' 89th season in the [[Rugby Football League]] and their 7th consecutive season in the top flight of [[Rugby league in England|English rugby league]]. The club competed in the [[2014 Super League season|2014 Super League]] and the [[2014 Challenge Cup]].

=== Dual registration ===
Castleford agreed a [[RFL dual registration|dual registration]] arrangement with the [[York City Knights]] in the [[Championship 1]].<ref>{{Cite web |last=Martini |first=Peter |date=21 January 2014 |title='It's good to talk', says Castleford's Daryl Powell on Knights link |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/yorkcityknights/10951747.its-good-to-talk-says-castlefords-daryl-powell-on-knights-link/ |access-date=21 January 2024 |website=The York Press}}</ref>
